name: Commerce World Pack
description: Phase 5 deterministic commerce-world baseline scenarios for trust-lab execution.

scenarios.name: Clean Agent-Assisted Purchase
scenarios.description: A delegated assistant submits an order with mandate and provenance coverage, leading to an accepted trust decision and authorized payment.

scenarios.name: Suspicious Refund Attempt
scenarios.description: A refund is requested by an agent without strong authority, producing a step-up trust decision and explicit trust failure events.
